description_long: This is a compact, two-story Japanese convenience store with a traditional tiled roof and a small storefront. The ground floor features a wooden facade with a fabric noren curtain above the entrance, potted plants, and signage in Japanese, including a playful cat illustration. The upper floor has a window with an air conditioning unit and additional signage, while the side and rear walls are plain with weathered textures. A vending machine is positioned at the back corner, and the building sits on a circular patch of ground, suggesting a standalone structure. The overall appearance combines traditional and modern elements, with muted blue, brown, and cream tones dominating the exterior.
description: A small, two-story Japanese convenience store with a tiled roof, wooden storefront, fabric noren, and prominent signage. Features include potted plants, a vending machine, and a blend of traditional and modern design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a noren curtain, potted plants, wooden facade, and large signage with Japanese text and a cat illustration.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the plain wall, vending machine, and the overhanging tiled roof; signage is visible on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simple, unadorned wall with weathered textures and the vending machine at the corner.
description_view_3: Side view with a partial view of the storefront signage, potted plants, and the tiled roof extending over the side.
attribute_storefront_signage: Large rectangular sign above the entrance with Japanese text ("パール・カリン") and a cat illustration, in cream and brown colors; vertical sign on the side wall with matching text; both are wall-mounted and non-illuminated.
